topics.title: Overhead (Top-Down) View Toggle
topics.summary: Press `O` to toggle a flat top-down view of the snake game board, zeroing camera angles and block height; restores prior settings on exit.

topics.title: Bot AI Fixes: Infinite Loop & Starvation Timer
topics.summary: Loop guard breaks bot oscillation cycles; starvation timer ends games when bots wander without eating. Both land in commit 4e91f64c.

topics.title: Freeze on Death with Loss Reason Display
topics.summary: When a snake dies, the board freezes with the fatal cell highlighted and a banner naming the cause; any key advances to Game Over.
